rationale: Educ. Code §12.152 governs commissioner authorization of open-enrollment charter schools. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: Sec. 12.152. AUTHORIZATION. (a) In accordance with this subchapter and Subchapter D, the commissioner may grant a charter on the application of:
_note: No conflict; rule_text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase.
